title: Alexandria
description: A medieval themed modpack in the newer versions of Minecraft.
body:
A medieval themed modpack in the newer versions of Minecraft.

Alexandria's aim is to realistically re-create medieval lore through a various mix of mods aimed to create the best unique medieval themed modding experience.

Alexandria provides a strong mix of bosses, adds sufficient weaponry to duel friends and foes with, unique foods and drinks, magic and sorcery for wizards and witches, and a plethera of blocks to build your greatest builds with.

Join our Discord for support!
